name: Apple Meringue 2
recipeIngredient: 6 medium Tart apples; peel and core
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice apples about 1/4 inch thick.
2. Place the sliced apples in a well-buttered baking dish.
3. Pour the melted butter over the apples.
4. Sprinkle with raisins, lemon juice, and half of the sugar.
5. Cover with aluminum foil and bake at 350°F for about 20 minutes, or until the apples are tender.
6. Beat egg whites with salt until stiff.
7. Gradually add the remaining sugar to make a stiff meringue.
8. Spread the meringue over the apples to the edge of the dish.
9. Bake an additional 10 minutes, or until the meringue is brown.
10. Serve warm. Cream may be added if desired.
